case_title: PENG, GEORGE vs. DACANAY, EDWARD L. et al

docket_entries.description: JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT DACANAY, EDWARD L. DACANAY, VICTORIA

M8/#624, JUDGE W DOUGLASS, CSR R BARULICH, CLK H HAMILTON 1400: CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. STEVEN WAXMAN FOR PLAINTIFF, PARKER LANE FOR DEFENDANTS. SETTLED, AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS WILL VACATE 21 CARR ST. S.F. BY 5:30 P.M. 4-14-98 & SURRENDER KEYS AT 2960 VAN NESS AVE. #A (PLTF COUNSEL'S OFFICE). PLAINTIFF WILL TENDER $900. PARTIAL REFUND OF SECURITY DEPOSIT IF KEYS ARE TIMELY SURRENDERED, AND WILL FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE ON 4-15-98. PLTFS WAIVE PAST DUE RENT. DEFENDANTS WAIVE ANY RENT BOARD, WRONGFUL EVICTION CLAIMS. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES.
